title: Writing Recipes
knowledge_note: Islamic scholars wrote recipe-like books to share knowledge across centuries. A recipe in ILMA does the same — write it once, share it forever.
explanation: A 'recipe' is a named block of code you can use over and over. Define it once, then call it by name whenever you need it.
starter_code:
recipe greet(name):
    say "Assalamu Alaikum, " + name

greet("Amira")
greet("Yusuf")
worked_example:
recipe greet(name):
    say "Assalamu Alaikum, " + name

greet("Amira")
greet("Yusuf")
challenge: Write a recipe that says "Bismillah before (action)".
expected_output:
Assalamu Alaikum, Amira
Assalamu Alaikum, Yusuf
